description: Composition Grey tunic made of 100% polyester, sleeveless, has a shawl neck, elasticated detail for a ruched effect at the sides and a flap layer passing through the loop at the midriff Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Use mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print jealous 21 stays in-vogue with this stylish piece that is sure to become a love-forever favourite in your casual wardrobe. Style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
